regulations.name: European Accessibility Act
regulations.description: The European Accessibility Act requires certain products and services to be accessible to persons with disabilities.

regulations.name: Web Accessibility Directive
regulations.description: The Web Accessibility Directive requires public sector bodies in the EU to make their websites and mobile applications accessible.

regulations.name: Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act
regulations.description: Section 508 requires federal agencies to make their electronic and information technology accessible to people with disabilities.

regulations.name: Americans with Disabilities Act
regulations.description: The ADA prohibits discrimination against people with disabilities and requires accessibility in places of public accommodation.

regulations.name: Equality Act 2010
regulations.description: The Equality Act 2010 requires service providers to make reasonable adjustments for disabled people, including digital accessibility.

regulations.name: Public Sector Bodies Accessibility Regulations
regulations.description: Requires public sector bodies in the UK to meet accessibility requirements for their websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Barrierefreie-Informationstechnik-Verordnung 2.0
regulations.description: BITV 2.0 implements web accessibility requirements for German federal public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Référentiel Général d'Amélioration de l'Accessibilité
regulations.description: RGAA is France's general accessibility improvement framework for digital public services.

regulations.name: Disability Discrimination Act 1992
regulations.description: The DDA prohibits discrimination on the grounds of disability in Australia, including inaccessible digital services.

regulations.name: Accessible Canada Act
regulations.description: The Accessible Canada Act aims to create a barrier-free Canada by 2040, including digital accessibility requirements.

regulations.name: JIS X 8341-3: Guidelines for older persons and persons with disabilities
regulations.description: JIS X 8341-3 is the Japanese standard for web content accessibility, aligned with WCAG 2.1.

regulations.name: Barrierefreiheitsgesetz — Web Accessibility Act (Austria)
regulations.description: Austria's national transposition of the EU Web Accessibility Directive, requiring public sector bodies to meet WCAG 2.1 AA.

regulations.name: Arrêté royal relatif à l'accessibilité des sites internet et des applications mobiles
regulations.description: Belgium's royal decree transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Наредба за достъпност на уебсайтовете и мобилните приложения
regulations.description: Bulgaria's ordinance transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector digital services.

regulations.name: Zakon o pristupačnosti mrežnih stranica i programskih rješenja za pokretne uređaje tijela javnog sektora
regulations.description: Croatia's law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Νόμος για την Προσβασιμότητα των Ιστοτόπων και των Εφαρμογών για Φορητές Συσκευές
regulations.description: Cyprus' law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector bodies' websites and mobile apps.

regulations.name: Zákon o přístupnosti internetových stránek a mobilních aplikací
regulations.description: Czech law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive, requiring public sector websites to meet WCAG 2.1 AA.

regulations.name: Bekendtgørelse om tilgængelighed af offentlige organers websteder og mobilapplikationer
regulations.description: Denmark's order transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector digital services.

regulations.name: Avaliku teabe seaduse muutmise seadus — veebilehtede ja mobiilirakenduste ligipääsetavus
regulations.description: Estonia's amendment to the Public Information Act transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive.

regulations.name: Laki digitaalisten palvelujen tarjoamisesta
regulations.description: Finland's Act on the Provision of Digital Services transposes the EU Web Accessibility Directive and sets WCAG 2.1 AA requirements.

regulations.name: Νόμος για την Προσβασιμότητα Ιστοτόπων και Εφαρμογών για Φορητές Συσκευές Φορέων του Δημόσιου Τομέα
regulations.description: Greece's law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Az elektronikus ügyintézés és a bizalmi szolgáltatások általános szabályairól szóló törvény módosítása
regulations.description: Hungary's transposition of the EU Web Accessibility Directive through amendment of the e-Administration Act.

regulations.name: European Union (Accessibility of Websites and Mobile Applications of Public Sector Bodies) Regulations 2020
regulations.description: Ireland's statutory instrument transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector digital services.

regulations.name: Legge Stanca — Disposizioni per favorire l'accesso dei soggetti disabili agli strumenti informatici
regulations.description: Italy's Stanca Law mandates web accessibility for public administration and private entities offering public services.

regulations.name: Decreto legislativo di recepimento della Direttiva WAD
regulations.description: Italy's legislative decree transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive, updating and extending the Stanca Law.

regulations.name: Publisko iestāžu tīmekļa vietņu un mobilās lietotnes pieejamības noteikumi
regulations.description: Latvia's Cabinet of Ministers regulations transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive.

regulations.name: Viešojo sektoriaus subjektų interneto svetainių ir mobiliųjų programų prieinamumo įstatymas
regulations.description: Lithuania's law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Loi relative à l'accessibilité des sites internet et des applications mobiles des organismes du secteur public
regulations.description: Luxembourg's law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector digital services.

regulations.name: Accessibility of Websites and Mobile Applications of Public Sector Bodies Regulations
regulations.description: Malta's regulations transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Tijdelijk besluit digitale toegankelijkheid overheid
regulations.description: The Netherlands' decree on digital accessibility for government transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive.

regulations.name: Ustawa o dostępności cyfrowej stron internetowych i aplikacji mobilnych podmiotów publicznych
regulations.description: Poland's act on digital accessibility of websites and mobile applications of public sector bodies.

regulations.name: Decreto-Lei n.º 83/2018 — Acessibilidade dos sítios web e aplicações móveis
regulations.description: Portugal's decree-law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector digital services.

regulations.name: Lege privind accesibilitatea site-urilor web și a aplicațiilor mobile ale organismelor din sectorul public
regulations.description: Romania's law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Zákon o prístupnosti webových sídel a mobilných aplikácií subjektov verejného sektora
regulations.description: Slovakia's law transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector digital services.

regulations.name: Zakon o dostopnosti spletišč in mobilnih aplikacij
regulations.description: Slovenia's Act on Accessibility of Websites and Mobile Applications transposes the EU Web Accessibility Directive.

regulations.name: Real Decreto 1112/2018 sobre accesibilidad de los sitios web y aplicaciones para dispositivos móviles del sector público
regulations.description: Spain's Royal Decree transposing the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector websites and mobile applications.

regulations.name: Lag om tillgänglighet till digital offentlig service
regulations.description: Sweden's Act on Accessibility to Digital Public Services transposes the EU Web Accessibility Directive.

regulations.name: Likestillings- og diskrimineringsloven — IKT-forskriften
regulations.description: Norway's ICT regulations under the Equality and Anti-Discrimination Act require WCAG 2.0 AA compliance for public and private sector digital services.

regulations.name: Bundesgesetz über die Beseitigung von Benachteiligungen von Menschen mit Behinderungen
regulations.description: Switzerland's Federal Act on the Elimination of Disadvantages to People with Disabilities requires accessible websites for public administration.

regulations.name: Reglugerð um aðgængi vefsíðna og farsímaforrita opinberra aðila
regulations.description: Iceland's regulation implementing the EEA equivalent of the EU Web Accessibility Directive for public sector digital services.

regulations.name: New Zealand Government Web Accessibility Standard
regulations.description: New Zealand's Web Accessibility Standard 1.1 mandates WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for New Zealand government websites and apps.

regulations.name: 한국형 웹 콘텐츠 접근성 지침 — Korean Web Content Accessibility Guidelines
regulations.description: South Korea's Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (KWCAG 2.1) apply to public and private sector digital services.

regulations.name: Guidelines for Indian Government Websites 2.0
regulations.description: India's Guidelines for Indian Government Websites 2.0 mandate WCAG 2.0 AA compliance for all Indian government websites.

regulations.name: Israeli Standard 5568 — Web Content Accessibility
regulations.description: Israel's Standard 5568 requires WCAG 2.0 AA compliance for websites targeting Israeli users across public and private sectors.

regulations.name: Modelo de Acessibilidade em Governo Eletrônico
regulations.description: Brazil's eMAG model for e-government accessibility sets WCAG-based requirements for all Brazilian federal government websites.

regulations.name: Ley 26.653 — Accesibilidad de la Información en las Páginas Web
regulations.description: Argentina's Law 26.653 requires all public sector websites to meet WCAG 2.0 AA accessibility standards.

regulations.name: Resolución 1519 del 2020 — Accesibilidad web
regulations.description: Colombia's Decree 1078/2015 establishes WCAG 2.0 AA accessibility requirements for state entity websites.

regulations.name: Norma Técnica para la Accesibilidad de los Sitios Web del Gobierno Federal
regulations.description: Mexico's technical standard for federal government website accessibility requires WCAG 2.0 AA compliance.

regulations.name: Norma Técnica sobre Accesibilidad y Usabilidad de Sitios Web del Estado
regulations.description: Chile's technical standard for State website accessibility and usability requires WCAG 2.1 AA for government digital services.

regulations.name: Electronic Communications and Transactions Act
regulations.description: South Africa's ECTA includes provisions requiring accessible digital services for persons with disabilities.

regulations.name: Kenya ICT Accessibility Standard
regulations.description: Kenya's ICT Accessibility Standard requires government digital services to be accessible to persons with disabilities.

regulations.name: Disability Rights Act 2018
regulations.description: Nigeria's Disability Rights Act 2018 includes requirements for accessible digital information and communications.

regulations.name: Singapore Government Design System — Accessibility Standard
regulations.description: Singapore's Government Design System mandates WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for all Singapore government digital services.

regulations.name: Guidelines on Accessibility of Government Websites
regulations.description: Hong Kong's OGCIO guidelines require government websites to conform to WCAG 2.0 AA standards.

regulations.name: 無障礙網頁開發規範 — Web Accessibility Guidelines for Government Websites
regulations.description: Taiwan's Web Accessibility Guidelines for Government Websites require WCAG 2.0 AA compliance for all government digital services.

regulations.name: 网站设计通用规范 — National Standard for Information Accessibility
regulations.description: China's national standard GB/T 37668-2019 on information accessibility of websites covers public sector digital services.

regulations.name: ГОСТ Р 52872-2019 — Интернет-ресурсы и другая информация, представленная в электронно-цифровой форме
regulations.description: Russia's national standard GOST R 52872-2019 sets accessibility requirements for web resources and digital information.

regulations.name: Kamu İnternet Sitesi Kılavuzu ve İçerik Yönetim Sistemi — Web Erişilebilirliği
regulations.description: Turkey's public internet website guide requires government websites to meet WCAG 2.0 AA accessibility standards.

regulations.name: Saudi Accessibility Framework for ICT
regulations.description: Saudi Arabia's ICT accessibility framework requires WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for government and regulated digital services.

regulations.name: UAE Federal Government Web Accessibility Standards
regulations.description: The UAE's Telecommunications and Digital Regulatory Authority requires government websites to meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

regulations.name: Egyptian ICT Accessibility Guidelines for Government Portals
regulations.description: Egypt's Ministry of Communications and IT guidelines require government web portals to meet WCAG 2.0 AA accessibility standards.

regulations.name: มาตรฐานเว็บไซต์ภาครัฐ — Thai Government Website Standard
regulations.description: Thailand's ETDA government website standard requires public sector websites to meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility criteria.

regulations.name: ADA Title II Web Accessibility Rule (2024)
regulations.description: DOJ final rule requiring state and local government web content and mobile apps to conform to WCAG 2.1 Level AA.

regulations.name: Section 255 of the Telecommunications Act
regulations.description: Requires telecommunications equipment and services to be accessible to persons with disabilities.

regulations.name: Air Carrier Access Act
regulations.description: Requires airline websites to conform to WCAG 2.0 Level AA.

regulations.name: 21st Century Communications and Video Accessibility Act
regulations.description: Requires advanced communications services and video programming to be accessible. References WCAG 2.0 Level AA.

regulations.name: California Government Code Section 7405
regulations.description: Requires California state entities to comply with Section 508 accessibility standards for IT.

regulations.name: Illinois Information Technology Accessibility Act
regulations.description: Requires Illinois state agencies and universities to ensure websites and IT systems are accessible.

regulations.name: Colorado HB21-1110 Accessibility for Persons with Disabilities
regulations.description: Strengthened protections against discrimination related to accessibility of Colorado government IT.

regulations.name: New York State Web Accessibility Policy
regulations.description: Requires New York State agencies to comply with WCAG 2.1 AA and Section 508 standards for web content.

sources.name: TDRA Web Standards — United Arab Emirates
ADA Title II Web Rule — United States
